projectDescription: A Clojure HTTP service that loads CSV data from multiple cloud and local sources (Google Drive, Dropbox, Amazon S3, Google Cloud Storage, local filesystem) via Apache Spark and returns a preview response.
keyFeatures: Single POST endpoint for loading CSV data from any supported source
Support for public and private files with per-provider authentication
Apache Spark-backed data loading for scalable CSV processing
Google Drive integration with OAuth2 refresh token flow and revision support
Dropbox integration supporting public links, private tokens, and revision downloads
Amazon S3 integration with IAM credentials and object versioning
Google Cloud Storage integration with service account JSON authentication
Local filesystem support for on-disk CSV files
JSON request validation with detailed error messages
Returns up to 10 preview rows per request
publicApiSurface: validate-body! — validates request body against clojure.spec
read-dataset — loads CSV into Spark from any configured source
fetch-file! — downloads remote file from GDrive or Dropbox to a temp path
dataset->preview — converts first 10 Spark rows to list of maps
load-config! — loads application config from EDN file
